title: Valentine's letter to Emily — written from Costa Rica with crossword Easter eggs
html:
TL;DR

  • A drafted Valentine's Day love letter from Yahir to Emily, written while Yahir is in Costa Rica — "It breaks my little heart knowing that I'm not with you, but I know you're having a good time with Meg."
  • Two letter drafts coexist in the doc — Yahir is iterating on tone ("I wish you could see yourself through my eyes" — soft, "radiating infectious beautiful aura that surrounds you").
  • Built around a virtual crossword gift with hidden answers (Protein, Tapatio, Yellow, Tooth, Yours, Chic, Kiss / Burger, Halloween, Bat, Chest, Icecube, Honey, Alot, Miamor, Cigs) — affection encoded as a puzzle the reader has to solve.
  • The TODOs at the bottom are pure craft notes: "the typescript writing in the love letter to be slower, something easy to read and doesn't feel cheap" — Yahir cares about the animation tempo of the gift.
  • A new locational data-point for the Emily arc: Costa Rica in mid-Feb 2026 — between the Feb 5 mesa redonda help and the Feb 21 doubt spiral.

The letter (excerpts)

"My lover Emily, I'm sorry that I won't be with you for this valentines day, but you are my beautiful girlfriend and I know that we are both going to be independently okay. It's a silly little holiday to express love, but any excuse to let you know how much I love you I will take. I wish you could see yourself through my eyes, because if you did you'd see the radiating infectious beautiful aura that surrounds you. I feel at ease when im with you and hearing your voice gives me comfort."

The second draft adds: "This is just a little thing I put together, something a little silly, but I hope you like it. I hope you can find the little easter eggs that I have throughout the entire journey."

What this tells us about the arc

By Feb 14, Yahir is geographically far from Emily (Costa Rica → Eugene), which compounds the long distance strain that fully erupts on Feb 21 (Cameron's birthday + the "shes fucking Riley while I wait on the call" spiral). The Valentine letter is the high-water mark of the affection — the next entry where Emily appears at this temperature is the March 13–25 Austin visit plan.

Build / craft notes

  • "Ok i want my emily to my dancing and doing like a little circle dance of some sort..." — wants animation of an Emily-character dancing in the gift.
  • "i need the typescript writing in the love letter to be slower" — typewriter-text effect tuning.
  • The gift was built as code ("I made this fun little virtual gift because I know computer") — fits Yahir's pattern of using the product builder muscle for personal-life gestures.

Privacy notes

  • Meg — first-name only mention as Emily's Valentine's-Day company. Single-mention; queue to Potential Entities.

Connections
